properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 17/18
NORSKEHAVET 
SCIENTIFIC ROCKET LAUNCHING.
TWO SCIENTIFIC ROCKETS WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOYA SPACE CENTER IN THE PERIOD FROM MARCH 3RD
TO MARCH 19TH 2018. THE LAUNCHES WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 1800 AND 2200 LT. IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD
SEAGOING TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS
HAZARD AREA 1
DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES
A. 69-17.5N - 016-00.5E
B. 69-20.0N - 015-48.7E
C. 69-38.9N - 014-55.1E
D. 69-52.5N - 014-56.0E
E. 69-59.2N - 015-57.0E
F. 69-49.6N - 016-29.8E
G. 69-22.5N - 016-09.0E
H. 69-17.9N - 016-02.6E
I.  69-17.5N - 016-00.5E
HAZARD AREA 2
DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES
A. 73-25.2N - 006-32.0E
B. 74-20.6N - 016-26.7E
C. 73-31.0N - 020-25.7E
D. 72-30.6N - 021-05.1E
E. 71-36.4N - 019-49.1E
F. 70-43.0N - 017-22.4E
G. 70-22.9N - 012-48.1E
H. 70-37.6N - 009-27.1E
I.  71-20.4N - 006-49.6E
J.  72-12.9N - 005-44.4E
K. 73-25.2N - 006-32.0E
PUBLISHED IN NORWEGIAN NOTICE TO MARINERS NO4 2018.
